# Sample Process Dashboard Spec — IT Incident Management
## Ready-to-execute Codex specification for a full Process BI report

**Report:** IT Incident Management & SLA Operations Dashboard  
**Theme:** `dark_analytics.json`  
**Canvas:** 1280×720 (3 pages)  
**Audience:** IT Operations Manager, Service Desk Lead, CTO  
**Refresh:** Daily (incremental refresh on Incidents table)  
**Generated by:** NightFactory ProcessBI design system  

---

## Data Model

### Source Tables

```sql
-- Incidents (fact table)
CREATE TABLE Incidents (
    IncidentID      VARCHAR(20) PRIMARY KEY,  -- e.g. INC-00001234
    Title           TEXT,
    Category        VARCHAR(50),              -- Infrastructure, Application, Network, Security, Other
    Priority        VARCHAR(5),               -- P1, P2, P3, P4
    Status          VARCHAR(20),              -- Open, In Progress, Resolved, Closed, Cancelled
    AssignedTeam    VARCHAR(50),
    AssignedAgent   VARCHAR(50),
    AffectedSystem  VARCHAR(50),
    RootCause       VARCHAR(50),
    CreatedDate     TIMESTAMP,
    AssignedDate    TIMESTAMP,
    FirstResponseDate TIMESTAMP,
    ResolvedDate    TIMESTAMP,
    ClosedDate      TIMESTAMP,
    SLAHours        DECIMAL(5,1),             -- P1=4, P2=8, P3=24, P4=72
    ReopenCount     INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    IsRepeat        BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE
);

-- Availability (daily system uptime log)
CREATE TABLE SystemAvailability (
    AvailDate       DATE,
    SystemName      VARCHAR(50),
    UptimeMinutes   INTEGER,
    TotalMinutes    INTEGER DEFAULT 1440,
    OutageCount     INTEGER DEFAULT 0
);

-- Changes (change management)
CREATE TABLE Changes (
    ChangeID        VARCHAR(20) PRIMARY KEY,
    Type            VARCHAR(20),              -- Standard, Normal, Emergency
    Status          VARCHAR(20),
    PlannedDate     DATE,
    ActualDate      DATE,
    SuccessFlag     BOOLEAN,
    RelatedIncidentID VARCHAR(20)
);
```

### Power BI Data Model Shape

```
DimDate ─────────────────────────────┐
  [Date]  [Year]  [Month]  [Quarter] │
  [IsWeekend]  [WeekNum]              │
  ↓                                   │
Incidents ──────────────────────────→ [CreatedDate]
  ↓                                   [ResolvedDate] (inactive relationship)
  → DimTeam [TeamID, TeamName]
  → DimCategory [Category, Priority, SLAHours_Default]
  → DimSystem [SystemName, Tier, Owner]

SystemAvailability
  → DimDate [Date]
  → DimSystem [SystemName]

Changes
  → DimDate [PlannedDate]
```

### Relationships
- `Incidents[CreatedDate]` → `DimDate[Date]` — **Many-to-One, Active**
- `Incidents[ResolvedDate]` → `DimDate[Date]` — Many-to-One, **Inactive** (use USERELATIONSHIP in DAX)
- `Incidents[AssignedTeam]` → `DimTeam[TeamID]` — Many-to-One
- `SystemAvailability[AvailDate]` → `DimDate[Date]` — Many-to-One

---

## Power Query (M) — Data Transformation

### Incidents Query
```m
let
    Source = Sql.Database("YOUR_SERVER", "ITSM_DB"),
    Incidents_Raw = Source{[Schema="dbo", Item="Incidents"]}[Data],
    
    // Type enforcement
    Typed = Table.TransformColumnTypes(Incidents_Raw, {
        {"IncidentID", type text},
        {"Priority", type text},
        {"Status", type text},
        {"CreatedDate", type datetime},
        {"ResolvedDate", type datetime},
        {"SLAHours", type number},
        {"ReopenCount", Int64.Type},
        {"IsRepeat", type logical}
    }),
    
    // Add SLA due date
    WithSLADue = Table.AddColumn(Typed, "SLADueDate",
        each [CreatedDate] + #duration(0, [SLAHours], 0, 0), type datetime),
    
    // Add SLA status label
    WithSLAStatus = Table.AddColumn(WithSLADue, "SLAStatus",
        each if [ResolvedDate] <> null and [ResolvedDate] <= [SLADueDate] then "MET"
             else if [ResolvedDate] <> null and [ResolvedDate] > [SLADueDate] then "MISSED"
             else if [ResolvedDate] = null and DateTime.LocalNow() > [SLADueDate] then "BREACHED"
             else if [ResolvedDate] = null and Duration.Hours(Duration.From([SLADueDate] - DateTime.LocalNow())) <= 1 then "AT RISK"
             else "OPEN", type text),
    
    // Remove cancelled records from main analysis
    ExcludeCancelled = Table.SelectRows(WithSLAStatus, each [Status] <> "Cancelled"),
    
    Output = ExcludeCancelled
in
    Output
```

### Date Table Query
```m
let
    StartDate = #date(2022, 1, 1),
    EndDate = #date(2027, 12, 31),
    DateList = List.Dates(StartDate, Duration.Days(EndDate - StartDate) + 1, #duration(1,0,0,0)),
    DateTable = Table.FromList(DateList, Splitter.SplitByNothing(), {"Date"}),
    
    WithYear       = Table.AddColumn(DateTable, "Year", each Date.Year([Date]), Int64.Type),
    WithMonth      = Table.AddColumn(WithYear, "MonthNum", each Date.Month([Date]), Int64.Type),
    WithMonthName  = Table.AddColumn(WithMonth, "MonthYear", each Text.From(Date.Year([Date])) & "-" & Text.PadStart(Text.From(Date.Month([Date])), 2, "0"), type text),
    WithQ          = Table.AddColumn(WithMonthName, "Quarter", each "Q" & Text.From(Date.QuarterOfYear([Date])), type text),
    WithWeek       = Table.AddColumn(WithQ, "WeekNum", each Date.WeekOfYear([Date]), Int64.Type),
    WithDOW        = Table.AddColumn(WithWeek, "DayOfWeek", each Date.DayOfWeekName([Date]), type text),
    WithIsWeekend  = Table.AddColumn(WithDOW, "IsWeekend", each Date.DayOfWeek([Date], Day.Monday) >= 5, type logical),
    
    Output = Table.TransformColumnTypes(WithIsWeekend, {{"Date", type date}})
in
    Output
```

---

## DAX Measures — Complete Library

### Measure Table Setup
```dax
-- Create an empty table called _Measures
-- Move all measures here for clean field list
_Measures = ROW("x", BLANK())
```

### === VOLUME MEASURES ===

```dax
Total Incidents = COUNTROWS(Incidents)

Open Incidents = 
COUNTROWS(FILTER(Incidents, Incidents[Status] IN {"Open", "In Progress"}))

Resolved Incidents = 
COUNTROWS(FILTER(Incidents, NOT(ISBLANK(Incidents[ResolvedDate]))))

P1 Incidents = CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(Incidents), Incidents[Priority] = "P1")
P2 Incidents = CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(Incidents), Incidents[Priority] = "P2")
P3 Incidents = CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(Incidents), Incidents[Priority] = "P3")
P4 Incidents = CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(Incidents), Incidents[Priority] = "P4")

-- Critical (P1+P2)
Critical Incidents = [P1 Incidents] + [P2 Incidents]
```

### === SLA MEASURES ===

```dax
SLA Breached Count = 
COUNTROWS(FILTER(Incidents,
    Incidents[SLAStatus] IN {"BREACHED", "MISSED"}
))

SLA Met Count = 
COUNTROWS(FILTER(Incidents,
    Incidents[SLAStatus] = "MET"
))

SLA At Risk Count = 
COUNTROWS(FILTER(Incidents,
    Incidents[SLAStatus] = "AT RISK"
))

SLA Compliance % = 
VAR Total = COUNTROWS(FILTER(Incidents, Incidents[SLAStatus] <> "OPEN"))
VAR Met = [SLA Met Count]
RETURN DIVIDE(Met, Total, 0)

P1 SLA Compliance % = 
CALCULATE([SLA Compliance %], Incidents[Priority] = "P1")

SLA Breach Rate % = 
DIVIDE([SLA Breached Count], [Total Incidents], 0)

-- Rolling 30D breach rate (for trend)
SLA Breach Rate 30D = 
DIVIDE(
    CALCULATE([SLA Breached Count], DATESINPERIOD('DimDate'[Date], TODAY(), -30, DAY)),
    CALCULATE([Total Incidents], DATESINPERIOD('DimDate'[Date], TODAY(), -30, DAY)),
    0
)
```

### === RESOLUTION TIME MEASURES ===

```dax
MTTR Hours = 
AVERAGEX(
    FILTER(Incidents, NOT(ISBLANK(Incidents[ResolvedDate]))),
    DATEDIFF(Incidents[CreatedDate], Incidents[ResolvedDate], HOUR)
)

P1 MTTR Hours = CALCULATE([MTTR Hours], Incidents[Priority] = "P1")
P2 MTTR Hours = CALCULATE([MTTR Hours], Incidents[Priority] = "P2")

-- SLA Target for MTTR by priority
MTTR SLA Target Hours = 
SWITCH(
    SELECTEDVALUE(DimCategory[Priority]),
    "P1", 4,
    "P2", 8,
    "P3", 24,
    72  -- P4 default
)

-- MTTR vs SLA (negative = faster than SLA)
MTTR vs SLA Hrs = [MTTR Hours] - [MTTR SLA Target Hours]

-- First Response Time
Avg First Response Hours = 
AVERAGEX(
    FILTER(Incidents, NOT(ISBLANK(Incidents[FirstResponseDate]))),
    DATEDIFF(Incidents[CreatedDate], Incidents[FirstResponseDate], HOUR)
)

-- Time to assign
Avg Assignment Hours = 
AVERAGEX(
    FILTER(Incidents, NOT(ISBLANK(Incidents[AssignedDate]))),
    DATEDIFF(Incidents[CreatedDate], Incidents[AssignedDate], HOUR)
)

-- Resolved using USERELATIONSHIP with ResolvedDate
Resolved by Date = 
CALCULATE(
    COUNTROWS(FILTER(Incidents, NOT(ISBLANK(Incidents[ResolvedDate])))),
    USERELATIONSHIP(Incidents[ResolvedDate], 'DimDate'[Date])
)
```

### === TREND MEASURES ===

```dax
-- 7-day rolling average incidents
Incidents Rolling 7D Avg = 
AVERAGEX(
    DATESINPERIOD('DimDate'[Date], LASTDATE('DimDate'[Date]), -7, DAY),
    CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(Incidents))
)

-- Month-over-month change
Prior Month Incidents = 
CALCULATE([Total Incidents], DATEADD('DimDate'[Date], -1, MONTH))

MoM Incident Change % = 
DIVIDE([Total Incidents] - [Prior Month Incidents], [Prior Month Incidents], 0)

-- YTD
YTD Incidents = CALCULATE([Total Incidents], DATESYTD('DimDate'[Date]))

YTD Resolved = 
CALCULATE(
    COUNTROWS(FILTER(Incidents, NOT(ISBLANK(Incidents[ResolvedDate])))),
    DATESYTD('DimDate'[Date])
)
```

### === WIP (OPEN INCIDENT BACKLOG) MEASURES ===

```dax
-- Current WIP (open incidents)
Incident WIP = 
COUNTROWS(FILTER(Incidents,
    NOT(ISBLANK(Incidents[CreatedDate]))
    && (ISBLANK(Incidents[ResolvedDate]) || Incidents[Status] = "Open")
))

-- WIP Age (avg days open)
WIP Avg Age Days = 
AVERAGEX(
    FILTER(Incidents, Incidents[Status] IN {"Open", "In Progress"}),
    DATEDIFF(Incidents[CreatedDate], TODAY(), DAY)
)

-- Backlog by priority (for swimlane matrix)
WIP by Priority Stage = 
CALCULATE(
    [Incident WIP],
    FILTER(Incidents,
        Incidents[Priority] = SELECTEDVALUE(DimCategory[Priority])
        && Incidents[AssignedTeam] = SELECTEDVALUE(DimTeam[TeamName])
    )
)

-- Oldest open incident
Oldest Incident Days = 
MAXX(
    FILTER(Incidents, Incidents[Status] IN {"Open", "In Progress"}),
    DATEDIFF(Incidents[CreatedDate], TODAY(), DAY)
)
```

### === AVAILABILITY MEASURES ===

```dax
System Availability % = 
DIVIDE(
    SUM(SystemAvailability[UptimeMinutes]),
    SUM(SystemAvailability[TotalMinutes]),
    1
)

-- Downtime minutes
Total Downtime Mins = 
SUM(SystemAvailability[TotalMinutes]) - SUM(SystemAvailability[UptimeMinutes])

-- Availability SLA target: 99.9% = "three nines"
Availability vs Target % = 
[System Availability %] - 0.999
```

### === REPEAT & QUALITY MEASURES ===

```dax
Repeat Incident Rate % = 
DIVIDE(
    COUNTROWS(FILTER(Incidents, Incidents[IsRepeat] = TRUE())),
    [Total Incidents],
    0
)

Reopened Rate % = 
DIVIDE(
    COUNTROWS(FILTER(Incidents, Incidents[ReopenCount] > 0)),
    COUNTROWS(FILTER(Incidents, NOT(ISBLANK(Incidents[ResolvedDate])))),
    0
)

Change Success Rate % = 
DIVIDE(
    COUNTROWS(FILTER(Changes, Changes[SuccessFlag] = TRUE())),
    COUNTROWS(Changes),
    0
)
```

### === BOTTLENECK / STAGE ANALYSIS ===

```dax
-- Queue depth by team (for swimlane)
Team Queue Depth = 
CALCULATE(
    [Incident WIP],
    FILTER(Incidents, Incidents[AssignedTeam] = SELECTEDVALUE(DimTeam[TeamName]))
)

-- Bottleneck score: teams with longest MTTR and highest WIP
Team Bottleneck Score = [Team Queue Depth] * [MTTR Hours]

-- Heat index for swimlane conditional formatting
Team Heat Index = 
DIVIDE(
    [Team Queue Depth],
    CALCULATE(MAXX(ALLSELECTED(DimTeam[TeamName]), [Team Queue Depth]))
)

-- Category bottleneck
Category Bottleneck Score = 
CALCULATE([Total Incidents], ALLEXCEPT(Incidents, Incidents[Category])) 
* [MTTR Hours]
```

### === LABELS & FORMATTING ===

```dax
Last Refresh = "Last updated: " & FORMAT(NOW(), "DD MMM YYYY HH:MM")

SLA Compliance Label = 
FORMAT([SLA Compliance %], "0.0%") & " SLA Compliance"

MTTR Label = 
FORMAT([MTTR Hours], "0.0") & "h avg MTTR"

Availability Label = 
FORMAT([System Availability %], "0.000%") & " Availability"
```

---

## Page Specifications

### Page 1: Operations Overview

**Layout (1280×720):**
```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ [IT Operations Dashboard]  [Date Range Slicer]  [Team Slicer]  [Logo] 60px│
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Open    │ SLA Comp% │  MTTR   │ P1 Count │ Avail%  │ Backlog Age   120px │
│  47     │  94.2%    │  6.3h   │   2      │ 99.97%  │  12.4 days         │
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ [Line: Daily incidents 30D    ][Bar: Incidents by Category + Priority] 220px│
│ with 7D rolling avg overlay   │ color coded P1=red, P2=orange, P3=yellow  │
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ [Matrix: Team × Priority WIP  ][Gauge: SLA Compliance % vs 95% target] 220px│
│ (swimlane heat map)           │ [KPI: MTTR P1 vs 4h SLA]                  │
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ [Footer: Last Refresh: {ts} | Source: ITSM System | v1.2]            30px│
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Visual 1: KPI Cards (6 cards across)**
| Card | Measure | Format | Conditional Color |
|---|---|---|---|
| Open Incidents | [Open Incidents] | Integer | >50=Red, >30=Amber, else Green |
| SLA Compliance | [SLA Compliance %] | 0.0% | <90%=Red, <95%=Amber, else Green |
| Avg MTTR | [MTTR Hours] | 0.0h | depends on priority mix |
| P1 Open | [P1 Incidents] | Integer | >0=Red, else Green |
| Availability | [System Availability %] | 0.000% | <99.5%=Red, <99.9%=Amber |
| Oldest Open | [Oldest Incident Days] | 0 days | >30=Red, >14=Amber |

**Visual 2: Incident Trend Line Chart**
- X axis: DimDate[Date] (last 30 days)
- Y axis (primary): [Total Incidents] — bar series
- Y axis (secondary): [Incidents Rolling 7D Avg] — line, 2.5px width, color #A8DADC
- Theme colors: bars by priority using data colors
- No axis titles; add reference line at average
- Data labels: off (too dense for 30D daily)

**Visual 3: Incidents by Category Bar Chart**
- X axis: [Total Incidents]
- Y axis: Incidents[Category] (sorted by total DESC)
- Color legend: Priority (P1=#E94560, P2=#FF7043, P3=#FFBE0B, P4=#A8DADC)
- Stacked bar chart
- Data labels: total at end of bar
- Sort: by total descending

**Visual 4: Swimlane Matrix (Team × Priority)**
- Visual type: Matrix
- Rows: DimTeam[TeamName] (sorted by Team Bottleneck Score DESC)
- Columns: DimCategory[Priority] (sorted P1→P4)
- Values: [Incident WIP]
- Conditional formatting → Background color: [Team Heat Index] (white=0 → #E94560=1)
- Column headers: dark background from theme
- Add data bars on row totals
- Show "—" for BLANK (zero WIP cells)

**Visual 5: Gauge — SLA Compliance**
- Value: [SLA Compliance %]
- Target: 0.95 (95% SLA target)
- Min: 0, Max: 1
- Color: fill based on value (<0.90=red, <0.95=amber, else green)
- Add data label with formatted %

---

### Page 2: SLA Deep Dive

**Layout:**
```
[Header: SLA Monitoring | Priority filter | Team filter | Category filter]
[KPI: SLA Met | SLA Breached | At Risk | P1 SLA % | P2 SLA % | Missed SLAs]
[Traffic light matrix: Team × Category × SLA Status count]
[Line: Daily SLA breach rate 60D trend]
[Table: Breached incidents — ID, Title, Priority, Team, SLA Due, Days Overdue, Status]
```

**Traffic Light Matrix:**
- Rows: DimTeam[TeamName]
- Columns: Incidents[Category]  
- Values: Count + conditional format by SLA status
- Conditional format rule:
  - If >10% breached in cell → Red (#E94560)
  - If >5% breached → Amber (#FFBE0B)
  - Else → Green (#2EC4B6)

**Breached Incidents Table:**
```
Columns: IncidentID | Title (truncated 40 chars) | Priority | Team | SLADueDate | Days Overdue | Status | Assigned Agent
Sort: Priority ASC, Days Overdue DESC
Conditional format: Priority column — P1=Red bg, P2=Orange bg
Filter: SLAStatus IN ("BREACHED", "MISSED")
Row limit: 200 (virtual scroll enabled)
```

---

### Page 3: Bottleneck & WIP Analysis

**Layout:**
```
[Header: WIP & Bottleneck Analysis | Date filter | Priority filter]
[KPI: Total WIP | Avg WIP Age | Oldest | Team with Most WIP | Top Bottleneck Category]
[Bar: WIP by Team sorted by Bottleneck Score DESC]
[Scatter: Team × MTTR (X) × WIP Count (Y), bubble size = Bottleneck Score]
[Funnel: Incident Stage flow — Open → Assigned → In Progress → Resolved]
[Table: Team detail with WIP Count, MTTR, SLA Compliance%, Bottleneck Score]
```

**Scatter Chart — Team Bottleneck:**
- X axis: [MTTR Hours] (higher = slower resolution)
- Y axis: [Team Queue Depth] (higher = more work piled up)
- Bubble size: [Team Bottleneck Score]
- Color: Red if Score > average, else Blue
- Data labels: TeamName on each bubble
- Quadrant reference lines at: avg MTTR (vertical), avg WIP (horizontal)
- Annotation: "High Priority Teams" in top-right quadrant

**Funnel Visual — Incident Flow:**
- Groups: Status categories mapped to stages
  - "Open" = New Arrivals
  - "In Progress" = Being Worked  
  - "Resolved" (within SLA) = SLA Met
  - "Resolved" (past SLA) = SLA Missed
- Values: [Total Incidents] per stage
- Colors: status-appropriate from theme
- Labels: count + % of total

---

## Drillthrough Pages

### DT_Incident — Incident Detail
- Triggered from: IncidentID in any table/visual
- Fields: Full incident record, timeline, SLA status, resolution notes
- Back button: top-left

### DT_Team — Team Detail
- Triggered from: TeamName in matrix or chart
- Fields: Team's open WIP, MTTR trend, SLA compliance by priority, agent breakdown

---

## Custom Tooltip Pages

### TT_Team_Tooltip (4"×2" page)
- Triggered: hover on swimlane matrix cell
- Shows: WIP Count, MTTR Hours, SLA Compliance % for that Team × Priority combination
- Mini bar chart: last 7 days incident volume for team

### TT_Incident_Trend (4"×2" page)
- Triggered: hover on trend line chart points
- Shows: Day's incident count by priority (mini stacked bar), MoM delta %

---

## Bookmarks

| Bookmark Name | State |
|---|---|
| BM_Overview_All | All filters cleared, page 1 active |
| BM_P1_Focus | Priority filter = P1 only |
| BM_SLA_Breached | SLA Status = Breached only |
| BM_Team_Network | Team slicer shows Infrastructure team |
| BM_This_Month | Date filter = current month |

---

## Theme Application Instructions

1. Download: `knowledge/power_bi_design/theme_files/dark_analytics.json`
2. In Power BI Desktop: View → Themes → Browse for themes → select `dark_analytics.json`
3. Verify: all visuals switch to dark background (#1A1A2E)
4. Manually override card backgrounds to #16213E with #0F3460 border
5. Set page background on all pages: #1A1A2E, 0% transparency

---

## Performance Notes

- **Import mode**: refresh daily, not DirectQuery
- **Row limit**: filter Incidents to last 24 months in Power Query (performance)
- **Disable auto date/time**: File → Options → Current File → Data Load → uncheck "Auto date/time"
- **Incremental refresh**: configure on Incidents table — rolling 2-year window
- **Aggregation table**: create `Incidents_Daily_Agg` (Date, Team, Priority, Count, AvgMTTR) for overview page
- **Visual count per page**: ≤8 visuals (this spec has 7-8 per page — acceptable)

---

## Codex Delivery Checklist

Before submitting Power BI file:
- [ ] All 60+ DAX measures created and tested (no errors)
- [ ] Theme JSON applied (dark_analytics.json)
- [ ] Date table marked as Date Table in Power BI
- [ ] All relationships configured correctly
- [ ] 3 main pages complete with correct layout
- [ ] 2 drillthrough pages created
- [ ] 2 custom tooltip pages created
- [ ] Slicers synced across pages (date, team, priority)
- [ ] All cards have no borders (transparent bg)
- [ ] Swimlane matrix has correct conditional formatting
- [ ] Scatter chart has quadrant reference lines
- [ ] All visuals have alt text
- [ ] Last Refresh card on every page
- [ ] Footer with source attribution
- [ ] Bookmarks functional
- [ ] Report tested with sample data (at least 500 incidents)
